channel.title: Command `install-package`
channel.description:
**--- [Feature Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Command-install-package-b5352d868897425e830467ce71bcca48)**
## Description Right now you have to install it in node_modules and then move it to the packages folder and change package.json manually. That work should be done automatically by a new command.
## User stories >As a **Frontity developer**, >I want to **install local packages with a command**, >so that I can **easily work with local packages in my project**.

item.title: Command `install-package`
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Yes, we haven’t started working on this yet. Right now, users have to run npm install any-package and add it manually to their projects.

Read full topic

item.title: Command `install-package`
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Is this Feature Discussion still “Awaiting Development”?

Read full topic

item.title: Command `install-package`
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
I started a PR here: https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/170

Read full topic

item.title: Command `install-package`
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
— Feature Card

Description

Right now you have to install it in node_modules and then move it to the packages folder and change package.json manually. That work should be done automatically by a new command.

User stories

As a Frontity developer,
I want to install local packages with a command,
so that I can easily work with local packages in my project.

Read full topic
